chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The utilization of the world upon (attaining) the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/14)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/14)
text: وَصِيَّتِهِ لِلْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ اسْتَعِينُوا بِبَعْضِ هَذِهِ عَلَى هَذِهِ وَ لَا تَكُونُوا كُلُولًا عَلَى النَّاسِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad, from Al Qasim Bin Al Rabi’e in his bequest to Al Mufazzal Bin Umar, said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Seek assistance with some of this upon this, and do not become a burden upon the people’.
en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ja’far ibn Muhammad from al-Qasim ibn al-Rabi‘ in his (Imam’s) advice to al- Mufaddal ibn ‘Umar who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘You should use certain items of these resources to overcome other tasks and do not become a burden on people.’”
